title: Step into the shadows with Sweeney Todd at the Arts Theatre
description: GEORGE ENTERTAINMENT - The George Society of...
bodyText:
GEORGE ENTERTAINMENT - The George Society of Arts Theatre is set to transport audiences to the shadowy streets of Victorian London with its upcoming production of Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street.


> This acclaimed musical, filled with suspense, drama, and unforgettable songs, will run from 29 October to 8 November.


The gripping story follows Sweeney Todd, a barber returning from wrongful imprisonment, who seeks revenge in the most chilling way.

Alongside his accomplice Mrs. Lovett, whose infamous pies hide a macabre secret, Todd’s tale is one of dark humour, haunting melodies, and twisted justice.Performances will take place nightly at 19:00, with 14:00 matinees on both Saturdays - ideal for those who prefer afternoon theatre.Staged by a talented local cast and crew, Sweeney Todd promises a production that combines powerful storytelling with a thrilling musical score.

Tickets cost R120 (members) and R150 (non-members) and is available on Webtickets.

Christopher Petrie as Sweeney Todd (left) and Sthembiso Masango as Pirelli. Photo: Beatrice Esterhuysen

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
